title: Scottish airport 'being used by Donald Trump to help bomb Iran'

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: PRESTWICK Airport is being used by Donald Trump to help facilitate the US bombing of Iran, according to a military intelligence expert ...

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Scottish airport 'being used by Donald Trump to help bomb Iran' Prestwick Airport in South Ayrshire is often used by the US military (Image: Colin Mearns)

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: This article is brought to you by our exclusive subscriber partnership with our sister title USA Today, and has been written by our American colleagues. It does not necessarily reflect the view of The Herald. PRESTWICK Airport is being used by Donald Trump to help facilitate the US bombing of Iran, according to a military intelligence expert.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Scottish airport is being used by Donald Trump to bomb Iran, says military expert
